hero.title: Building Excellence Powering Progress
hero.subtitle: Leading Construction & Solar Solutions in Malawi
hero.description: Professional construction services and innovative solar power solutions. Delivering quality projects from concept to completion with over 8 years of industry expertise.

about.overview_paragraph1: Constratech Trading is a fully registered and certified construction company delivering comprehensive solutions across Malawi's most demanding sectors. Since 2015, we've earned the trust of major organizations including UNHCR, UNDP, NACRO, FAO, World Vision, Care International, and the Southern Region Water Board by consistently delivering high-quality projects on time and on budget.
about.overview_paragraph2: We offer a complete range of services—from civil and building construction to solar power solutions, borehole drilling, water reticulation and irrigation systems, engineering design, and general supply. This integrated approach means our clients get seamless project delivery, whether it's a complex water system, a solar installation, or major civil works.
about.overview_paragraph3: Our credentials reflect our commitment to excellence. We're registered with the Registrar of Companies, the Construction Industry Regulatory Authority (CIRA), Malawi Revenue Authority, National Water Resources Authority, PPDA, and the Ministry of Trade among others. Our CIRA registration for both Civil and Building categories—CLASS 4 up to MK 500 million each—confirms our capacity to handle substantial, complex projects. More importantly, it reflects the experience and expertise we bring to every job.
about.mission_text: To deliver exceptional construction and solar power solutions that exceed client expectations through innovation, quality craftsmanship, and sustainable practices. We are committed to building lasting relationships and contributing to Malawi's infrastructure development.
about.vision_text: To be the leading construction and renewable energy solutions provider in Malawi, recognized for excellence, innovation, and sustainable development. We aspire to set industry standards and contribute significantly to the nation's economic growth.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We conduct business with the highest standards of honesty, transparency, and ethical behavior, building trust with our clients and partners.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for excellence in every project, ensuring quality workmanship and attention to detail in all our deliverables.

values.title: Customer Focus
values.description: Our clients are at the heart of everything we do. We prioritize their needs, ensuring satisfaction through personalized and reliable solutions.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: We foster a collaborative environment, encouraging teamwork and partnerships to achieve mutual success and outstanding results.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We integrate eco-friendly practices into our designs and operations, contributing to a greener and more sustainable future for Malawi.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We embrace innovation and continuously seek better solutions to meet evolving industry challenges and client needs.

about.cta_description: Let's discuss how we can bring your construction vision to life.

services_section.section_description: Constratech Trading delivers excellence across multiple domains. From large-scale construction projects to innovative solar installations, we provide cost-effective, efficient solutions for commercial businesses, homeowners, and international organizations.

services.title: General Contracting
services.description: Construction of buildings and concrete structures, pavements, and access roads with professional expertise.

services.title: Concept & Design
services.description: Complete project management from inception to completion, including licensing, permits, and detailed specifications.

services.title: Solar Power Solutions
services.description: Design and installation of solar-powered domestic and irrigation water reticulation systems.

services.title: Construction Consulting
services.description: Tailored consulting solutions and professional engineering design services.
